name: Project Manager Dev
postCreateCommand: echo '=== Installing dependencies ===' && echo 'Node version:' && node --version && echo 'Python version:' && python3 --version && cd backend && pip install --quiet -r requirements.simple.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
postAttachCommand: echo '=== Project ready! ===' && echo 'Run: cd frontend && npm run dev' && echo 'Run: cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000'
